testcase.name: getCustomerBillingOptions_v2
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected:<{"CustomerBillingOptions":[{"CustomerId":"Customer003","Billing":{"BilledCustomer":1,"TaxSchedule":{"Id":"ONT GST/PST","Description":"Ontario GST/PST"},"PaymentTerm":{"Id":"NET 30","Description":"Net 30 days"},"BillTemplate":{"Name":""},"BudgetEligible":1,"ElectronicBilling":{"Enabled":0,"Drillback":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=SQL_2017&Srv=RND-BASE-A&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=CustomerOptionElectronicBilling&CustomerId=Customer003&CogsDrillback=1"},"DepositRequired":0,"PreauthorizedPaymentPlan":{"Enabled":0,"Drillback":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=SQL_2017&Srv=RND-BASE-A&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=CustomerOptionPreathorizePaymentPlan&CustomerId=Customer003&CogsDrillback=1"},"CharityDonation":{"Enabled":0,"Drillback":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=SQL_2017&Srv=RND-BASE-A&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=CustomerOptionCharityDonation&CustomerId=Customer003&CogsDrillback=1"},"EarlyPaymentDiscount":{"Enabled":0,"Drillback":"cogsDrillback://DGPB/?Db=SQL_2017&Srv=RND-BASE-A&Cmp=TWO&Prod=229&Act=OPEN&Func=CustomerOptionEarlyPaymentDiscount&CustomerId=Customer003&CogsDrillback=1"}},"Success":true,"Messages":[{"Enabled":0,"Info":""}]}]}> testcase.name: getLocationsByCustomer_v3
